title: Rubius Horizons - Data Pack
description: Datapack for modpack Horizons, that balances items and add custom drops for different bosses and enemies.
body:
This is a simple datapack for modpack [Horizons](https://modrinth.com/modpack/horizons1) that balances items and add custom drops for different bosses and enemies.

- Changed drops for mod [Bosses Of Mass Destruction](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction) By **Barribob**
- Drops added will be mainly from mod [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords) By **Sweenus**

![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/449142d2069e005a7d482352cdfd2afec0969a8c.jpeg)
